title: Dove India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Dove India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Dove India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dove India:
Dove India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dove India!
